name: The Hobbit
description: J.R.R. Tolkien's classic tale of Bilbo Baggins, a hobbit who embarks on an unexpected journey with a company of dwarves.

additionalInfo.value: Prequel to The Lord of the Rings

reviews.title: A timeless adventure
reviews.reviewText: Tolkien's storytelling is warm, witty, and utterly enchanting. The Hobbit is charming from first page to last. I read it as a child and again as an adult and it is even more enjoyable the second time around.

reviews.title: Perfect introduction to Middle-earth
reviews.reviewText: Lighter in tone than the Lord of the Rings but every bit as magical. A perfect book for readers of any age. The world building is rich and the characters are loveable.

reviews.title: Wonderful classic fantasy
reviews.reviewText: This was my first Tolkien book and I was completely swept away. The writing is engaging and full of imagination. Cannot wait to move on to The Lord of the Rings.
